nasb.text: Moreover, whoever goes into the house during the time that he has quarantined it, becomes unclean until evening.

esv.text: Moreover, whoever enters the house while it is shut up shall be unclean until the evening,

cnv.text: 在房屋被關閉的期間，進去的人必不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 房子封闭期间，任何人进去，都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
